subject: Kim-Trump border meeting: history or photo-op?
body:

## What Does Putin Really Want?

## Kim-Trump border meeting: History or just a photo-op?

**apnews.com / FOSTER KLUG** TOKYO (AP) — It sure looked historic: President Donald Trump and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un strode toward each other Sunday from opposite sides of... read more

## These monkeys are 3,000 years into their own 'Stone Age'

**nationalgeographic.com / Michael Greshko** While capuchins won't use tools like us any time soon, the species now “has its own individual archaeological record,” scientists report. For capuchin... read more

<image>

## Low-Wage Workers Are Being Sued for Unpaid Medical Bills by a Nonprofit Christian Hospital That Employs Them

**propublica.org / Wendi C. Thomas** Methodist Le Bonheur Healthcare has sued many of its own employees over unpaid medical bills and garnishes their wages; its health care plan prevents... read more

<image>

## Why Do Dogs Look So Sad?

**theatlantic.com / Haley Weiss** Two specialized muscles give them a range of expression that wolves eyes' lack. Dogs, more so than almost any other domesticated species, are desperate... read more

<image>

## Cain and Abel and Oil

## When Myspace Was King, Employees Abused a Tool Called ‘Overlord’ to Spy on Users

## Woodstock ‘Took on a Life of its Own,’ Recent Archaeological Survey Reveals
